hooks.command:
python3 -c "import json,sys,re,os; p=json.load(sys.stdin); t=p.get('tool_input',{}) or {}; fp=t.get('file_path') or t.get('path') or ''; \
   SENSITIVE=[r'^CNAME$', r'\\.env(\\..+)?$', r'_workers/.*secrets?', r'\\.claude/settings\\.json$']; \
   pat=[re.compile(x) for x in SENSITIVE]; rel=os.path.relpath(fp) if fp else ''; \
   hit=next((x.pattern for x in pat if x.search(rel)),None); \
   sys.stderr.write('[guard] sensitive edit blocked on '+rel+' ('+hit+') — remove this hook in .claude/settings.json if the edit is intended.\\n') or sys.exit(2) if hit else sys.exit(0)"

python3 -c "import json,sys,os,subprocess; p=json.load(sys.stdin); t=p.get('tool_input',{}) or {}; fp=t.get('file_path') or t.get('path') or ''; \
   if not fp: sys.exit(0); \
   # This repo has no package.json — skip build. Run HTML/JS sanity where cheap. \
   if fp.endswith('.html'): \
      r=subprocess.run(['node','-e','const fs=require(\"fs\"),h=fs.readFileSync(process.argv[1],\"utf8\");const m=h.match(/<script>([\\s\\S]*?)<\\/script>/g)||[];let e=0;m.forEach(s=>{try{new Function(s.replace(/^<script>/,\"\").replace(/<\\/script>$/,\"\"));}catch(err){e++;console.error(\"js-syntax:\",err.message.slice(0,120));}});process.exit(e?2:0);', fp], capture_output=True, text=True); \
      sys.stderr.write(r.stderr); sys.exit(r.returncode); \
   if fp.endswith(('.js','.mjs')): \
      r=subprocess.run(['node','--check',fp], capture_output=True, text=True); \
      sys.stderr.write(r.stderr); sys.exit(r.returncode); \
   sys.exit(0)"
osascript -e 'display notification "sourcedeck-site: review needed" with title "Claude Code" sound name "Pop"' 2>/dev/null; exit 0
